Honey Garlic Salmon

Serves: 4 | Prep: 10 minutes | Cook: 15 minutes

Ingredients

  • 4 fillets salmon
  • 1/4 cup honey
  • 3 tbsp soy sauce
  • 3 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1 tbsp olive oil

Instructions

  1. Whisk honey, soy sauce, and garlic in a bowl.
  2. Sear salmon in olive oil, 4 minutes per side.
  3. Pour sauce over salmon, simmer 2 minutes until glossy.
